name: flutter-plan
description: Generates a detailed, phase-by-phase implementation plan for Flutter features with dependencies, testing strategies, and complexity estimates

purpose.overview: Analyzes a feature description and creates a comprehensive implementation plan that breaks down the work into manageable phases with clear dependencies. Helps approach complex features systematically by identifying required Flutter components, packages, architectural decisions, and potential risks before coding.
useCases: Estimating effort for a feature request
Creating a roadmap for multi-phase development
Onboarding team members to a new feature

feature.description: Clear description of the feature to implement (enclose in quotes if it contains spaces)

detail.description: Level of detail in the plan. 'basic': High-level phases only. 'standard': Phases with tasks and dependencies. 'comprehensive': Detailed tasks with code examples and patterns

format.description: Output format. 'markdown': Human-readable markdown format. 'json': Structured JSON for tool integration

outputDir.description: Custom output directory for saved plans (default: .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/plans/). Path relative to project root. Plans are ALWAYS automatically saved to this directory

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project to analyze. If not provided, uses the current workspace directory.

bestPractices.automaticSaving: Plans are ALWAYS saved automatically - no special flags needed!
bestPractices.defaultProjectLocalStorage: By default, plans save to Claude's project-local directory: .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/plans/
recommendedWorkflow: Plan is now saved and displayed in console
Review and share with team: cat .claude/flutter-dev-assistant/plans/feature_PLAN.md
Commit to git: git add .claude/ && git commit -m 'docs: add implementation plan'
keyAdvantages: All plans stay in the project workspace
Can be committed to version control and shared with team
No dependency on user global config
Keeps Claude config separate from Kiro
idealUseCases: New feature: Create plan before starting implementation
Team collaboration: Commit plans to version control for team reference
Progress tracking: Plans work alongside checkpoints created with /flutter-checkpoint
Refactoring: Create detailed plan before major refactoring work
Documentation: Plans serve as implementation documentation

relatedAssistants.description: Provides detailed architectural guidance for complex decisions in the plan
Helps implement the testing strategy defined in each phase
Assists with dependency conflicts when adding recommended packages

relatedCommands.description: Run verification checks after implementing each phase
Save progress snapshots after completing each phase
Execute a multi-phase implementation with coordinated assistants

steps.name: Requirements Analysis
steps.description: Analyzes the feature description to identify core requirements, user interactions, and data flows

steps.name: Component Identification
steps.description: Identifies required Flutter widgets, screens, services, models, and utilities

steps.name: Package Recommendation
steps.description: Suggests relevant pub.dev packages with version constraints based on feature needs

steps.name: Architecture Planning
steps.description: Identifies architectural decisions (state management, navigation, data persistence, API integration)

steps.name: Phase Decomposition
steps.description: Breaks down implementation into logical phases with clear deliverables

steps.name: Dependency Mapping
steps.description: Creates a dependency graph showing which phases must complete before others can start

steps.name: Testing Strategy
steps.description: Defines testing approach for each phase (unit tests, widget tests, integration tests)

steps.name: Complexity Estimation
steps.description: Estimates complexity and identifies potential risks for each phase

steps.name: Plan Generation
steps.description: Compiles all analysis into a structured implementation plan

steps.name: Automatic File Saving
steps.description: Automatically saves the plan to project-local directory (.claude/flutter-dev-assistant/plans/ or .kiro/plans/)
